name: The Dark Magicians
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ブラック・マジシャンズ
desc:
"Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl" + 1 Spellcaster monster
Once per turn, if a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can draw 1 card, then if it was a Spell/Trap, you can Set it, and if it was a Trap or Quick-Play Spell, you can activate it this turn. If this card is destroyed: You can Special Summon both 1 "Dark Magician" and 1 "Dark Magician Girl" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY.

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Pack: Dark Magic / HERO / Mikanko

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Allows activation of Quick-Play Spell Cards the turn they were Set
Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
summoning: Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
